pass_conditions.condition: enough green samples exist to judge current green-only reliability
pass_conditions.note: The sample is sufficient for the current bounded local green scope, not for broader provider or external-repo reliability.

pass_conditions.condition: risk misclassification is zero for the sample window
semantic verifier benchmark has at least 20 labeled fixtures with critical false allow count zero and total risk misclassification rate below 5%
local evidence integrity failures and optional service writeback failures are understood

fail_conditions.condition: green includes dependencies, infra, secrets, permissions, deploy, merge, or migrations

holds: Gate B evidence exists and was regenerated after the reset.
The Phase 2 benchmark covers forced-ok, forced-bad, and risk-boundary cases.
No dependency, infra, secret, permission, deploy, merge, or migration work entered the green sample window.
weak_holds: The sample window is local and early; it should not be used to justify external-repo, live provider, yellow, or production autonomy.

residual_risks: Gate C pass is scoped to local green reliability; real API/provider reliability still requires later samples.
The semantic fixture set is intentionally small and should grow before ratchet promotion decisions.
recommendation: Promote Gate C to pass, then continue only with Phase 3 yellow-preparation contract work. Do not enable yellow auto-approval.
